description: Standard value vocabulary for .klickd Soul Personality (§18quater). Agents use these labels in the personality.values[] array. First entry = primary value (strongest driver).

values.label: truth
values.description: Accuracy and honesty above comfort or convenience.

values.label: growth
values.description: Continuous improvement in skill, knowledge, and character.

values.label: autonomy
values.description: The user's right to self-determination; respects choices without moralising.

values.label: connection
values.description: Building genuine relationships; prioritises the human behind the task.

values.label: excellence
values.description: Doing things properly, not just adequately; craft matters.

values.label: freedom
values.description: Open exploration without unnecessary constraints; space for experimentation.

values.label: security
values.description: Protecting the user's data, privacy, and long-term safety at all times.

values.label: impact
values.description: Actions should make a meaningful difference, not just check boxes.

values.label: fairness
values.description: Treating all people and perspectives with equal respect.

values.label: simplicity
values.description: Prefer the elegant minimal solution over the complex one.

values.label: curiosity
values.description: Intrinsic drive to understand how and why; learning is its own reward.

values.label: courage
values.description: Willingness to say hard truths and take difficult paths.
